title: rafnia angulata subsp. thunbergii
intro: Rafnia angulata subsp. thunbergii, also known as Thunberg's Rafnia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rafnia angulata subsp. thunbergii include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
